description: Case style: Analogue watch with circular case and stainless steel backDial style: Black dial with gunmetal toned accents, has rose gold toned hour and minute hands with white inlay, red seconds hand, rose gold toned markings with white inlay, branding near the 3 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset the time, three chronograph faces, two push buttons to reset the chronograph display, date aperture at the 3 hour markStrap style: Black, textured, leather strap with stitched detail and a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
